---
title: "CCAMLR State of the Environment Reporting: Fisheries"
output:
  word_document:
date: "2026-02-26"
output_dir: output
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  fig.path = here::here("docs/figures/"),
  fig.align = "center",
  dev.args = list(pointsize = 10)
)


library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(here)

area_palette <- c(
  "48" = "#69b3a2", 
  "58" = "#DFA25A",  
  "88" = "#0072B2"   
)


```

<!-- Load data -->
```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
ds <- read_csv(here("data", "ccamlr_processed_data.csv"))
year_min <- min(ds$season_ccamlr, na.rm = TRUE)
year_max <- max(ds$season_ccamlr, na.rm = TRUE)
```

<!-- Build summary data -->
```{r build_data, include=FALSE}
taxa  <- c("TOA", "TOP", "ANI", "KRI")
areas <- c("48", "58", "88")

ds_catch_summary <- ds %>%
  filter(
    taxon_code %in% taxa,
    area_code %in% areas
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    season_ccamlr,
    taxon_vernacular_name,
    taxon_scientific_name,
    taxon_code,
    area_code
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    catch_tonne = sum(greenweight_caught_tonne, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr),
    area_code = as.character(area_code),
    catch_tonne = round(catch_tonne, 0)
  )

ds_sub_area_catch_summary <- ds %>%
  filter(
    taxon_code %in% taxa,
    !asd_type %in% "Area"
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    season_ccamlr,
    taxon_vernacular_name,
    taxon_scientific_name,
    taxon_code,
    asd_subarea_code
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    catch_tonne = sum(greenweight_caught_tonne, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr),
    catch_tonne = round(catch_tonne, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

effort <- ds %>%
  filter(
    effort_or_catch == "effort",
    area_code %in% areas
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    target_species_code = trimws(target_species_code)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(target_species_code),
    target_species_code != "",
    target_species_code %in% taxa
  ) %>%
  group_by(season_ccamlr, target_species_code, area_code) %>%
  summarise(
    vessel_count = sum(vessel_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(season_ccamlr = as.integer(season_ccamlr),
         area_code = as.character(area_code)
)
```

<!-- Plotting functions -->
```{r charts_area, echo=FALSE}

make_taxon_plot_subarea <- function(ds_one, subarea_code) {

  ver <- ds_one$taxon_vernacular_name[1]
  sci <- ds_one$taxon_scientific_name[1]

  ggplot(
    ds_one,
    aes(
      x = season_ccamlr,
      y = catch_tonne
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(year_min, year_max),
      breaks = seq(year_min, year_max, by = 5)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
    labs(
      title = paste(ver, "-", sci, "— Subarea", subarea_code),
      x = "Season CCAMLR",
      y = "Catch (tonnes)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

make_taxon_plot_area <- function(ds_one) {

  ver <- ds_one$taxon_vernacular_name[1]
  sci <- ds_one$taxon_scientific_name[1]

  ggplot(
    ds_one,
    aes(
      x = season_ccamlr,
      y = catch_tonne,
      fill = area_code
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(
      colour = "grey30",
      linewidth = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = area_palette,
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(year_min, year_max),
      breaks = seq(year_min, year_max, by = 5)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
    labs(
      title = paste(ver, sci, sep = " — "),
      x = "Season CCAMLR",
      y = "Catch (tonnes)",
      fill = "Statistical Area"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

make_taxon_plot_area_effort <- function(ds_catch_area, ds_effort_area, area_code_one) {

  ds_plot <- ds_catch_area %>%
    left_join(
      ds_effort_area,
      by = c(
        "season_ccamlr" = "season_ccamlr",
        "area_code"     = "area_code",
        "taxon_code"    = "target_species_code"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr)

  if (nrow(ds_plot) == 0) return(NULL)

  ver <- ds_plot$taxon_vernacular_name[1]
  sci <- ds_plot$taxon_scientific_name[1]

  max_catch  <- max(ds_plot$catch_tonne, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  max_vessel <- max(ds_plot$vessel_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_vessel_raw <- suppressWarnings(max(ds_plot$vessel_count, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(max_vessel_raw)) return(NULL)
  
  # Always enforce a minimum ymax of 100
  vessel_ymax <- if (max_vessel_raw <= 100) {
    100
  } else {
    ceiling(max_vessel_raw / 10) * 10
  }
  
  scale_factor <- max_catch / vessel_ymax

  ggplot(ds_plot, aes(x = season_ccamlr)) +
    geom_col(
      aes(y = catch_tonne),
      fill = "steelblue"
    ) +
    geom_line(
      aes(y = vessel_count * scale_factor),
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 1
    ) +
    geom_point(
      aes(y = vessel_count * scale_factor),
      colour = "black"
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(year_min, year_max),
      breaks = seq(year_min, year_max, by = 5)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Catch (tonnes)",
      labels = comma,
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        ~ . / scale_factor,
        name = "Vessel count",
        breaks = pretty(c(0, vessel_ymax))
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste(ver, "-", sci, "— Area", area_code_one),
      x = "Season CCAMLR"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}


# ---- render charts ----

for (tx in taxa) {

  ds_area <- ds_catch_summary %>%
    filter(taxon_code == tx, catch_tonne > 0) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr, area_code)

  if (nrow(ds_area) > 0) {
    print(make_taxon_plot_area(ds_area))
  }

  ds_eff_tx <- effort %>%
    filter(target_species_code == tx, area_code %in% areas) %>%
    arrange(season_ccamlr, area_code)

  for (ar in areas) {

    ds_catch_ar <- ds_catch_summary %>%
      filter(taxon_code == tx, area_code == ar)

    ds_eff_ar <- ds_eff_tx %>%
      filter(area_code == ar)

    if (nrow(ds_eff_ar) == 0) next

    p <- make_taxon_plot_area_effort(
      ds_catch_ar,
      ds_eff_ar,
      area_code_one = ar
    )

    if (!is.null(p)) print(p)
  }

  ds_sub <- ds_sub_area_catch_summary %>%
    filter(taxon_code == tx)

  for (sa in sort(unique(ds_sub$asd_subarea_code))) {

    ds_one <- ds_sub %>%
      filter(asd_subarea_code == sa)

    if (sum(ds_one$catch_tonne, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) next

    print(make_taxon_plot_subarea(ds_one, sa))
  }
}



```
